explore.description: Explore a task before formal commitment or reopen the problem when assumptions break

debate.description: Run a bounded advisory debate across internal subagents before asking the human to break a tie

spec.description: Commit to the chosen direction in a canonical spec before planning or implementation

plan.description: Turn an approved planned-path spec into an execution plan with topology, dependencies, and checkpoints

build.description: Execute approved work from either a direct-build spec or an approved plan while preserving workspace boundaries

test.description: Verify at the right layer and bounce back into repair when checks fail

review.description: Run a findings-first pre-integration review for the current lifecycle change set

ship.description: Prepare the integration path to merged state and close the workspace only after merged completion
